mapper.sql: select p.purchase_id, p.purchase_no, p.supplier_id, p.supplier_name, p.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_type, p.total_amount, p.tax_amount, p.total_with_tax, p.purchase_status, p.purchase_date, p.expected_time, p.submit_by, p.submit_time, p.approve_by, p.approve_time, p.close_by, p.close_time, coalesce(i.item_count, 0) as item_count, coalesce(i.total_quantity, 0) as total_quantity, coalesce(i.received_quantity, 0) as received_quantity, case when coalesce(i.total_quantity, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(i.received_quantity * 100.0 / i.total_quantity, 2) end as receive_progress, case when p.expected_time is not null and p.expected_time < now() and p.purchase_status not in ('completed', 'done', 'closed') then 1 else 0 end as overdue, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from erp_purchase_order p left join erp_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = p.warehouse_id left join ( select purchase_id, count(*) as item_count, coalesce(sum(quantity), 0) as total_quantity, coalesce(sum(received_qty), 0) as received_quantity from erp_purchase_order_item group by purchase_id ) i on i.purchase_id = p.purchase_id
mapper.select: select item_id, purchase_id, purchase_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, received_qty, purchase_price, tax_rate, amount, tax_amount, tax_inclusive_amount from erp_purchase_order_item where purchase_id = #{purchaseId} order by item_id

select p.purchase_id as purchaseId, p.purchase_no as purchaseNo, p.purchase_date as purchaseDate, p.supplier_id as supplierId, p.supplier_name as supplierName, p.purchase_status as purchaseStatus, i.quantity, i.received_qty as receivedQty, i.purchase_price as purchasePrice, i.tax_rate as taxRate, i.tax_inclusive_amount as taxInclusiveAmount from erp_purchase_order_item i inner join erp_purchase_order p on p.purchase_id = i.purchase_id where i.sku_id = #{skuId} and p.purchase_status != 'closed' order by p.purchase_date desc, p.purchase_id desc limit #{limit}

select count(*) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when purchase_status = 'draft' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as draftCount, coalesce(sum(case when purchase_status = 'submitted' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as pendingApprovalCount, coalesce(sum(case when expected_time < now() and purchase_status not in ('completed', 'done', 'closed') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as overdueCount, coalesce(sum(case when purchase_status not in ('completed', 'done', 'closed') then total_with_tax else 0 end), 0) as openAmount from erp_purchase_order
mapper.insert:
insert into erp_purchase_order_item( purchase_id, purchase_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, received_qty, purchase_price, tax_rate, amount, tax_amount, tax_inclusive_amount ) values
(#{item.purchaseId}, #{item.purchaseNo}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.skuCode}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.receivedQty}, #{item.purchasePrice}, #{item.taxRate}, #{item.amount}, #{item.taxAmount}, #{item.taxInclusiveAmount})
mapper.update: update erp_purchase_order set purchase_no = #{purchaseNo}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, total_with_tax = #{totalWithTax}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, expected_time = #{expectedTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where purchase_id = #{purchaseId} and purchase_status = 'draft'
mapper.insert:
insert into erp_purchase_receipt_item( receipt_no, purchase_no, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, cost_price, amount, batch_no ) values
(#{receiptNo}, #{purchaseNo}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.skuCode}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.batchNo})
mapper.delete: delete from erp_purchase_order_item where purchase_id in #{purchaseId}
